tagline: People- and company-intelligence: contact discovery, enrichment, and agentic research.
description_md: Sixtyfour is the app-store front door for the Sixtyfour people-intelligence and company-intelligence API. It gives an agent contact discovery (find email / find phone), reverse lookups from an email or phone, full person and company enrichment, and an agentic QA researcher that answers free-form questions about a person or company. All returned as clean structured JSON, every field source-backed.

methods.name: sixtyfour.people_intelligence
methods.summary: People Intelligence: full, source-backed enrichment of a person from seed details.

methods.name: sixtyfour.company_intelligence
methods.summary: Company Intelligence: full, source-backed company profile, optionally with people.

methods.name: sixtyfour.find_email
methods.summary: Contact discovery: find a verified email for a person from partial details.

methods.name: sixtyfour.find_phone
methods.summary: Contact discovery: find a phone number for a person from partial details.

methods.name: sixtyfour.reverse_email
methods.summary: Reverse lookup: identify the person and company behind an email address.

methods.name: sixtyfour.reverse_phone
methods.summary: Reverse lookup: identify the person and company behind a phone number.

methods.name: sixtyfour.enrich_linkedin
methods.summary: Enrich a person directly from their LinkedIn profile URL.

methods.name: sixtyfour.qa
methods.summary: Agentic QA researcher: answer free-form qualification questions about a person or company, with sources.

methods.name: sixtyfour.research_agent
methods.summary: Research agent: autonomous multi-step research over an entity, returning structured findings with sources.

methods.name: sixtyfour.filter_search
methods.summary: Filter Search: structured field-based search across the corpus; returns matching entities.

methods.name: sixtyfour.deep_search
methods.summary: Deep Search (agentic): start a natural-language search. Returns a task_id; results are retrieved asynchronously (see caveats).

methods.name: sixtyfour.help
methods.summary: Discovery: every method with params, kind, and latency class.

Notes: Sixtyfour is the app-store front door for the Sixtyfour people-intelligence and company-intelligence API. It gives an agent contact discovery (find email / find phone), reverse lookups from an email or phone, full person and company enrichment, and an agentic QA researcher that answers free-form questions about a person or company. All returned as clean structured JSON, every field source-backed.
